nodes.name: Gerygone
nodes.summary: Gerygone（Gerygone）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联19种鸟类，如Yellow-bellied gerygone、Brown gerygone、Green-backed gerygone等19种鸟类。

nodes.name: Plain gerygone
nodes.summary: The plain gerygone (Gerygone inornata) is a species of bird in the family Acanthizidae. It is found on the islands of Wetar and Timor. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical mangrove forest. References External links Gerygone inornata on Bird Life International Gerygone inornata on Encyclopedia of Life Gerygone inornata on Global Biodiversity Information Facility Gerygone inornata on Biolib Gerygone inornata on ITIS
nodes.shortSummary: The plain gerygone (Gerygone inornata) is a species of bird in the family Acanthizidae. It is found on the islands of Wetar and Timor.
